penalties.description: No actual FLS peg transfer task performance visible in the provided frames.

consensus_score.reasoning: The provided frames contain only presentation slides about FLS automation and machine vision systems. No actual peg transfer task performance is visible. This appears to be educational content rather than a scorable FLS performance video.

disagreements.rationale: Claude's assessment that this is presentation slides rather than actual task performance is more consistent with the incomplete_task penalty and lack of visible FLS equipment or performance.

claude_value.description: No actual FLS peg transfer task performance visible in the provided frames.

gpt_value.description: One block left the field of view and was not retrievable.

disagreements.rationale: If no actual FLS task performance is visible as Claude reports, then a lost_object penalty cannot be assessed. The incomplete_task penalty is the appropriate automatic-zero condition.
Consistent with incomplete_task assessment - no phases can be detected if no actual task performance is visible.
Incomplete_task penalty results in automatic zero score regardless of timing calculations.
